result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 21:     AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mon...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%%'
),
case_owner_stats AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY case_id
),
base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(c.id, '^#', '') AS case_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS current_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.case_id, b.createddate, b.closeddate,
         COALESCE(os.owner_assignment_count, 0) AS owner_assignment_count,
         b.current_owner_id
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN case_owner_stats os ON os.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(os.owner_assignment_count, 0) <= 1
),
case_agent AS (
  SELECT
    nt.case_id,
    COALESCE(oa.agent_id, nt.current_owner_id) AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = nt.case_id
),
agents_case_counts_managed AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
agent_handle AS (
  SELECT ca.agent_id,
         AVG(ca.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases
  FROM case_agent ca
  GROUP BY ca.agent_id
)
SELECT ah.agent_id
FROM agent_handle ah
JOIN agents_case_counts_managed m ON m.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1
  AND ah.closed_cases > 0
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
),
case_owner_stats AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY case_id
),
base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(c.id, '^#', '') AS case_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS current_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.case_id, b.createddate, b.closeddate,
         COALESCE(os.owner_assignment_count, 0) AS owner_assignment_count,
         b.current_owner_id
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN case_owner_stats os ON os.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(os.owner_assignment_count, 0) <= 1
),
case_agent AS (
  SELECT
    nt.case_id,
    COALESCE(oa.agent_id, nt.current_owner_id) AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = nt.case_id
),
agents_case_counts_managed AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
agent_handle AS (
  SELECT ca.agent_id,
         AVG(ca.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases
  FROM case_agent ca
  GROUP BY ca.agent_id
)
SELECT ah.agent_id
FROM agent_handle ah
JOIN agents_case_counts_managed m ON m.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1
  AND ah.closed_cases > 0
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
),
case_owner_stats AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY case_id
),
base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(c.id, '^#', '') AS case_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate,
    regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS current_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months'
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.case_id, b.createddate, b.closeddate,
         COALESCE(os.owner_assignment_count, 0) AS owner_assignment_count,
         b.current_owner_id
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN case_owner_stats os ON os.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(os.owner_assignment_count, 0) <= 1
),
case_agent AS (
  SELECT
    nt.case_id,
    COALESCE(oa.agent_id, nt.current_owner_id) AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closeddate - nt.createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = nt.case_id
),
agents_case_counts_managed AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
agent_handle AS (
  SELECT ca.agent_id,
         AVG(ca.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases
  FROM case_agent ca
  GROUP BY ca.agent_id
)
SELECT ah.agent_id
FROM agent_handle ah
JOIN agents_case_counts_managed m ON m.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1
  AND ah.closed_cases > 0
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(ch.caseid__c, '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
),
case_owner_stats AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY case_id
),
base_cases AS (
  SELECT
    regexp_replace(c.id, '^#', '') AS case_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
    regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS current_owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.case_id, b.created_ts, b.closed_ts,
         COALESCE(os.owner_assignment_count, 0) AS owner_assignment_count,
         b.current_owner_id
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN case_owner_stats os ON os.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(os.owner_assignment_count, 0) <= 1
),
case_agent AS (
  SELECT
    nt.case_id,
    COALESCE(oa.agent_id, nt.current_owner_id) AS agent_id,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (nt.closed_ts - nt.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases nt
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = nt.case_id
),
agents_case_counts_managed AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS managed_cases
  FROM owner_assignments
  GROUP BY agent_id
),
agent_handle AS (
  SELECT ca.agent_id,
         AVG(ca.handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds,
         COUNT(*) AS closed_cases
  FROM case_agent ca
  GROUP BY ca.agent_id
)
SELECT ah.agent_id
FROM agent_handle ah
JOIN agents_case_counts_managed m ON m.agent_id = ah.agent_id
WHERE m.managed_cases > 1
  AND ah.closed_cases > 0
ORDER BY ah.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
